home.ourServicesDesc: Tell us about your project — we help clarify the scope and connect you with the right trade
home.verifiedDesc: Our guided questions translate your idea into a clear, build-ready brief

home.howWeWorkSubtitle: A structured process that protects your time and your investment
home.step1Desc: Tell us what you need. Our guided questions turn your idea into a clear, structured brief — no vague descriptions.
home.step2Desc: We match your project with verified professionals who understand the scope, budget, and timeline from day one.
home.step3Desc: You communicate directly, agree terms personally, and work with confidence — supported by reviews and accountability.
home.step4Desc: The job is completed to standard. Both sides review the experience, building trust for the next project.
home.servicesSubtitle: Specialist trades and project support across Ibiza
home.svc1Desc: Full property renovations, extensions, and new-build projects managed with precision.
home.svc2Desc: Foundations, masonry, roofing, and load-bearing modifications by certified professionals.
home.svc3Desc: Custom carpentry, fitted kitchens, bathrooms, and high-end finishing work.
home.svc4Desc: Architectural design, planning applications, and end-to-end project coordination.
home.svc5Desc: Pools, gardens, terraces, pergolas, and outdoor living spaces designed for Ibiza.
home.svc6Desc: Electrical, plumbing, HVAC, painting, and skilled trades — all verified and local.
home.whySubtitle: Built from real experience inside Ibiza's construction industry
home.testimonial1: Finally, a platform that understands how construction actually works here. Clear briefs, reliable professionals, no wasted time.
home.testimonial2: I receive jobs that match my skills and area. The scope is clear before I even reply. It respects my time.
home.portfolioSubtitle: Real results from real builds across Ibiza
home.project1Result: Delivered on time. Full interior and exterior transformation including new pool terrace.
home.project2Result: Turnkey 3-bedroom villa. Coordinated architecture, structural, and finishing trades.
home.project3Result: Restaurant conversion completed before season. Electrical, plumbing, and custom joinery.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: This system is simple in structure, but thoughtful in design. It guides the job at the beginning — so the working relationship starts properly.
howItWorks.trustBadge: Guided process • Intelligent matching • Ibiza only
howItWorks.introP1: It doesn't replace how people work.
howItWorks.introP3: Clear structure at the start removes confusion later.
howItWorks.clientStep1Desc: Select the specific service you need — not just a broad trade. This allows the system to tailor the right questions to your job.
howItWorks.clientStep1Why: Clear service selection prevents vague posts and misunderstandings from the beginning.
howItWorks.clientStep2Desc: You're guided through practical, trade-specific questions. No long paragraphs. No repeating yourself in multiple messages.
howItWorks.clientStep2Why: Professionals understand the scope before messaging you — sometimes even before needing a site visit. That reduces back-and-forth and leads to more realistic pricing.
howItWorks.clientStep3Desc: Set a budget range and preferred timeframe.
howItWorks.clientStep3Why: It prevents misalignment. Professionals can respond honestly, and you avoid unrealistic quotes.
howItWorks.clientStep4Desc: Your job is analysed properly before notifications are sent.
howItWorks.clientStep4Why: Only relevant professionals are notified. You then speak directly and agree terms personally.
howItWorks.clientClosing: The system supports the beginning — the relationship remains human.
howItWorks.proStep1Title: Define What You Actually Want to Do
howItWorks.proStep1Desc: You don't just select a trade. You choose exact services, sub-services, your working area, and the type of work you prefer. You decide what reaches you.
howItWorks.proStep1Why: You receive work aligned with your strengths and interests — not just anything under your trade label.
howItWorks.proStep2Desc: When a job matches you, it already includes clear service type, scope questions answered, budget range, and timing.
howItWorks.proStep2Why: You're not chasing basic information. You can decide calmly whether it's worth pursuing. That protects your time and standards.
howItWorks.proStep3Desc: Once matched, you speak directly with the client. You agree details in your own way.
howItWorks.proStep3Why: The system does not interfere with how you work. It simply improves how the job begins.
howItWorks.whyExistsIntro: Because too much time is wasted in construction:
howItWorks.whyExists3: Site visits just to understand basic scope
howItWorks.whyExistsClosing: Structure at the beginning prevents frustration later.
howItWorks.standards1: Clients are guided to provide proper detail.
howItWorks.standards2: Professionals are expected to communicate clearly and respectfully.

account.q: Do I need an account to post a job?
account.a: Yes. An account allows your job to be structured properly and ensures communication stays organised.

howLong.q: How long does it take to post a job?
howLong.a: Usually 1–2 minutes. The guided process walks you through practical, trade-specific questions.

isFree.a: Yes. You only agree terms directly with the professional you choose.

howMatched.a: They choose which services they want to be matched with. When your job aligns with their selected services, preferences, and area, they're notified.

unverified.a: Yes. Verification is earned over time — it reflects reliability, not payment.

contactPro.q: How do I contact a professional?
contactPro.a: Through secure in-platform messaging. No phone numbers or emails are shared until you're ready.

editJob.q: Can I change my job details after posting?
editJob.a: Yes. You can update your job if something changes, so professionals always see accurate information.

vsWhatsapp.q: What makes this better than WhatsApp groups?
vsWhatsapp.a: Jobs are structured from the beginning. Professionals receive only relevant work. Scope, budget and timing are clarified early. Communication remains direct — without message floods.

about.heroSubtitle: Built from real experience inside Ibiza's construction industry
about.missionP1: Ibiza's construction industry runs on relationships, trust, and word of mouth. But as projects grow more complex and expectations rise, the old ways — WhatsApp groups, scattered referrals, unclear briefs — aren't enough anymore.
about.missionP2: Constructive Solutions Ibiza was created to bridge that gap. A structured platform that helps clients describe exactly what they need, and connects them with professionals who understand the job before they pick up the phone.
about.wwd1Desc: Guided questions turn vague ideas into clear, build-ready briefs. No long paragraphs — just clarity.
about.wwd2Desc: Professionals choose what they do. Jobs reach the right people automatically — no spam, no noise.
about.wwd3Desc: Verified profiles, structured communication, and reputation that actually means something.
about.wwd4Desc: We focus on what we know: builders, electricians, plumbers, carpenters, and skilled trades across Ibiza.
about.ibizaP1: After years working across Ibiza's construction sites, one thing became clear: this island operates differently. Generic platforms don't fit.
about.ibizaBullet3: A mix of languages, cultures, and working styles
about.ibizaBullet4: Professionals who deserve visibility for quality work
about.ibizaP2: This platform is tailored specifically for how Ibiza actually works — not a global template trying to fit the island.
about.std1: Professionals are proud of their profile
about.std2: Clients are clear about their needs
about.std3: Communication is structured from day one
about.futureP1: This is Phase 1. We're starting with construction and property services only — building it correctly before expanding. Our goal isn't to be the biggest platform on the island.
about.futureTagline: Our goal is to be the most reliable.
about.founderQuote: I've seen what happens when communication breaks down on a job site. Misaligned expectations, wasted time, good professionals buried under noise. I built this because I believe the industry deserves better tools — and Ibiza deserves a platform that actually understands how work gets done here.
about.founderClosing: Constructive Solutions Ibiza is my commitment to raising the standard — not racing to the bottom on price, but building trust, clarity, and accountability into every project.
about.ctaDesc: Whether you need work done or you're a professional looking for the right opportunities — we're here to help.

score.title: Constructive Reputation Score
score.desc: Each completed job generates a score based on four core metrics.

bronze.requirements: Starting level. Complete your first jobs successfully.
bronze.benefits: Professional profile, portfolio gallery, reviews, job notifications, basic exposure.

silver.requirements: 10+ completed jobs, rating above 4.5, no serious disputes.
silver.benefits: Higher job visibility, priority notifications, stronger trust badge, reduced commission.

gold.requirements: 40+ completed jobs, rating above 4.8, high completion rate, platform trust score.
gold.benefits: Top search placement, premium job opportunities, advanced data insights, reputation badge.

gold.title: Gold Data Access
gold.desc: Gold professionals gain access to Constructive Market Data — insights that help grow your business.

testimonials.title: What Builders Say
